title: Verification Gates and the Observation Budget

questions.question: Before reading the lesson: which of these is the strongest reason a harness needs a deterministic gate chain rather than a model-as-judge?
options: Models are too slow to act as judges in production.
Determinism makes the deny reason auditable and the chain replayable.
A model-as-judge always produces hallucinated allow decisions.
Gate chains let the model write its own policy.
questions.explanation: Audit trails and reproducibility are the practical wins. A judge model can also be wired in, but the structural gate needs to be deterministic so the decision can be reproduced and reviewed.
questions.question_zh: 在阅读课程之前: 为什么 harness 需要确定性的 gate chain,而不是 model-as-judge?
options_zh: 模型在生产中作为 judge 太慢。
确定性让拒绝原因可审计、链路可重放。
model-as-judge 总是产出幻觉式的放行决定。
Gate chain 让模型自己写策略。
questions.explanation_zh: 审计追溯和可复现性是务实的收益。也可以接入一个 judge 模型,但结构性 gate 必须是确定性的,这样决定才能复现并被审查。

questions.question: Why does the lesson run WhitelistGate before BudgetGate in the chain?
options: Whitelist denials are cheaper, so short-circuiting them avoids the expensive ledger sum.
BudgetGate cannot run until at least one tool has been called.
Whitelist must always be the last gate by convention.
Order does not matter because GateChain randomises evaluation order.
questions.explanation: Cheap denials run first. WhitelistGate is O(1) hash lookup. BudgetGate has to sum the ledger. Short-circuiting on whitelist avoids that work when the call is structurally illegal.
questions.question_zh: 为什么本节的链路里 WhitelistGate 在 BudgetGate 之前?
options_zh: 白名单拒绝更便宜,先短路它能避免昂贵的 ledger 求和。
BudgetGate 必须等到至少调用过一次工具才能跑。
按惯例 Whitelist 必须是最后一个 gate。
顺序无关,GateChain 会随机化求值顺序。
questions.explanation_zh: 便宜的拒绝先跑。WhitelistGate 是 O(1) 的 hash 查找,而 BudgetGate 必须求和 ledger。先白名单短路就能在结构性非法时跳过那部分工作。

questions.question: An ObservationLedger has recorded a 60-token observation from read_file. The harness then refuses a subsequent call. What does the ledger record about the refusal?
options: A zero-token Observation row tagged refused.
Nothing. The ledger only records successful observations.
A negative-token Observation row representing the refusal cost.
The refusal is appended as a synthetic Observation with the refuser's name.
questions.explanation: The ledger records observations the model has seen. A refusal produces a GateDecision, not an Observation. Refusal counts live alongside the ledger, not inside it.
questions.question_zh: ObservationLedger 已记录一次来自 read_file 的 60-token observation。harness 之后拒绝了一次后续调用。Ledger 里关于这次拒绝记录了什么?
options_zh: 一行 token 数为零、标记为 refused 的 Observation。
什么都没有。Ledger 只记录成功的 observation。
一行表示拒绝代价的负 token 数 Observation。
拒绝被作为合成 Observation 追加,带上拒绝者的名字。
questions.explanation_zh: Ledger 记录模型看到过的 observation。拒绝产生的是 GateDecision,而不是 Observation。拒绝计数与 ledger 并列,而不是写进 ledger。

questions.question: RecencyGate.window is set to 3. The ledger's latest_turn is 5. A new ToolCall arrives on turn 10. What happens?
options: The gate allows: the call is on the latest turn.
The gate denies: gap of 5 exceeds window of 3.
The gate allows: window applies to ledger size, not turn gap.
The gate raises an exception because the ledger is stale.
questions.explanation: RecencyGate compares (call.turn - ledger.latest_turn) against the window. 10 - 5 = 5, which is greater than 3, so the gate denies.
questions.question_zh: RecencyGate.window 设为 3。Ledger 的 latest_turn 是 5。一次新的 ToolCall 在 turn 10 到达。会发生什么?
options_zh: gate 放行: 调用就在最新 turn。
gate 拒绝: 间隔 5 超过窗口 3。
gate 放行: 窗口针对的是 ledger 大小,而不是 turn 间隔。
gate 抛出异常,因为 ledger 过期。
questions.explanation_zh: RecencyGate 比较 (call.turn - ledger.latest_turn) 与 window。10 - 5 = 5,大于 3,所以拒绝。

questions.question: You want to add a per-call output cap (no single observation may exceed 8000 tokens). Where does this gate logically belong in the chain?
options: Before WhitelistGate, since size is the cheapest property to check.
After BudgetGate, since cumulative budget always dominates.
It cannot be a gate because the size is only known after the tool runs.
Inside the BudgetGate so the limits compose.
questions.explanation: The output size is not known at gate-evaluation time. The harness applies the cap after the tool runs, by truncating the observation before the model sees it. Gates evaluate inputs, not outputs.
questions.question_zh: 你想加一个每次调用的输出上限 (单次 observation 不超过 8000 token)。这条 gate 在链路上属于哪里?
options_zh: WhitelistGate 之前,因为 size 是最便宜的属性。
BudgetGate 之后,因为累计预算总是占主导。
它不能是 gate,因为大小要等工具运行后才知道。
放进 BudgetGate 内,让限制可叠加。
questions.explanation_zh: 在 gate 求值时还不知道输出大小。harness 在工具运行后通过截断 observation 来执行该上限。Gate 评估的是输入,不是输出。

questions.question: A reviewer asks you to prove that the agent never fired a denied tool call during a session. Which artifact do you point them at?
options: The ObservationLedger snapshot, which only contains successful observations.
The list of ChainOutcome records, which contains every per-call decision with deny reasons.
The pytest output, which records test pass/fail.
The model's chat transcript, which contains its own self-report.
questions.explanation: ChainOutcome records carry per-call decisions and deny reasons. The ledger and transcript can support the claim, but the auditable artifact is the chain decisions.
questions.question_zh: 评审者要求你证明 agent 在一次会话中从未触发过被拒的工具调用。你指给他看哪份 artifact?
options_zh: ObservationLedger 快照,只包含成功的 observation。
ChainOutcome 记录列表,包含每次调用的决定与拒绝原因。
pytest 输出,记录测试的通过 / 失败。
模型的对话记录,内容是它的自陈。
questions.explanation_zh: ChainOutcome 携带每次调用的决定与拒绝原因。Ledger 和对话记录可以辅证,但可审计的 artifact 是链路决定。
